name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.6.0: autosave + checkpoint + recover_from_autosave (closes #37) — open_document gains autosave_every: Int (every N mutations write checkpoint to <path>.autosave.docx); new MCP tools checkpoint + recover_from_autosave; get_session_state adds autosave_detected + autosave_path; save_document cleans up autosave on success. v3.5.5: keep_bak opt-in (closes #38). v3.5.4: actor refactor (closes #39). v3.5.3: atomic-rename save (closes #36). Built on ooxml-swift 0.13.2.
